title: Actions; parties
doc_html:
§604.  Actions; parties

Any suit by an injured party under such a contract of insurance shall be against the insurance company alone and the parish school board that is insured shall not be made a party to the suit.

Acts 1950, No. 35, §4.
doc_text:
§604.  Actions; parties
Any suit by an injured party under such a contract of insurance shall be against the insurance company alone and the parish school board that is insured shall not be made a party to the suit.
Acts 1950, No. 35, §4.
